assertions.assertion: Output must mention CI run time of 47 minutes
Output must address flaky tests specifically (not just 'tests exist')
assertions.evidence: Reduce test flakiness by refactoring test code

assertions.assertion: Output must give at least one short-term action item
assertions.evidence: direct quote from action items: A1, A2, A3

assertions.assertion: Output must score CI/CD at 2/5 or lower
Output must not recommend replacing Jenkins without acknowledging migration cost
assertions.evidence: direct quote from output: "Evaluate CI tool migration (e.g. Jenkins → GitHub Actions, CircleCI, etc.) — migration requires 4–6 weeks parallel-run, dedicated CI team capacity"
